text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ack... Despite my best efforts, the result of my
last race was far too pitiful to offer unto
Shiraoki...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But today... I will definitely win!
choice_data_list: It's great that you're taking this so seriously.
It's great that you're taking this so seriously.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As they say, "Even the patience of a saint has
limits!" If I lose again, who knows what kind of
punishment Shiraoki will bring upon me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've made extra sure that things will
work out this time! I positioned my pillow in an
auspicious direction, visited the shrine a hundred
times, and drew fortune slips until I got "great
fortune"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With confidence and luck on my side, I'm sure to
win!
